event: Death of Francesca da Rimini and Paolo Malatesta
description: A dramatic painting showing two figures collapsed on a marble floor after being slain. A woman in a white and gold dress lies draped backward over a red cushion or settee, her head thrown back. A man in red and dark clothing lies at her feet, a sword visible nearby. The setting is a luxurious interior with a patterned marble floor and columns visible in the background. An armored figure is partially visible at the far right, suggesting the husband who discovered and killed the lovers. The scene is richly colored and theatrical.

_meta.title: Death of Francesca da Rimini and Paolo Malatesta
